mapper.select: SELECT employee_id AS employee_account, employee_name, gender AS employee_gender, age AS employee_age, entry_date AS entry_time, position AS staff, '' AS employee_message FROM employee
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (employee_name, gender, age, entry_date, position) VALUES (#{employeeName}, #{employeeGender}, #{employeeAge}, #{entryTime}, #{staff})
mapper.select: SELECT employee_id AS employee_account, employee_name, gender AS employee_gender, age AS employee_age, entry_date AS entry_time, position AS staff, '' AS employee_message FROM employee WHERE employee_id = #{employeeAccount}

SELECT employee_id AS employee_account, employee_name, gender AS employee_gender, age AS employee_age, entry_date AS entry_time, position AS staff, '' AS employee_message FROM employee
AND ( CAST(employee_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR employee_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND gender = #{gender}
AND position LIKE CONCAT('%', #{staff}, '%')
ORDER BY employee_id ASC
